languages.text: "Я знаю, медикарии режут и вас тоже. Заменяют по кусочку! Они сведут вас с ума, Лорд-капитан, превратят в механизм, вот увидите. Я должен остановить это. Остановить боль". {n}Взгляд преступника теряет осмысленность.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я знаю, медикарии режут и вас тоже. Заменяют по кусочку! Они сведут вас с ума, Лорд-капитан, превратят в механизм, вот увидите. Я должен остановить это. Остановить боль". {n}Взгляд преступника теряет осмысленность.{/n}

languages.text: "I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я знаю, медикарии режут и вас тоже. Заменяют по кусочку! Они сведут вас с ума, Лорд-капитан, превратят в механизм, вот увидите. Я должен остановить это. Остановить боль". {n}Взгляд преступника теряет осмысленность.{/n}

"I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich weiß, dass die Medicae-Offiziere auch Euch zerteilen werden, Stück für Stück! Sie werden Euch in den Wahnsinn treiben, Lord Captain, und Euch in eine Maschine verwandeln. Ihr werdet sehen! Ich muss es aufhalten. Ich muss den Schmerz beenden." {n}Die Augen des Kriminellen verlieren ihren Fokus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß, dass die Medicae-Offiziere auch Euch zerteilen werden, Stück für Stück! Sie werden Euch in den Wahnsinn treiben, Lord Captain, und Euch in eine Maschine verwandeln. Ihr werdet sehen! Ich muss es aufhalten. Ich muss den Schmerz beenden." {n}Die Augen des Kriminellen verlieren ihren Fokus.{/n}

languages.text: « Je sais que les officiers de medicae vous découpent aussi en morceaux ! Vous aussi, vous allez finir par sombrer dans la folie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Ils vont faire de vous une machine. Vous verrez ! Je dois y mettre un terme. Je dois faire cesser toute cette souffrance. » {n}Le regard du criminel semble comme perdu dans le vide.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je sais que les officiers de medicae vous découpent aussi en morceaux ! Vous aussi, vous allez finir par sombrer dans la folie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Ils vont faire de vous une machine. Vous verrez ! Je dois y mettre un terme. Je dois faire cesser toute cette souffrance. » {n}Le regard du criminel semble comme perdu dans le vide.{/n}

languages.text: “我知道，那些医务官也在把您一刀刀切开！他们会把您逼疯的，舰长大人，把您变成一台机器。您等着瞧吧！我必须阻止这一切，让这痛苦停止。”{n}罪犯的眼神失去了焦点。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我知道，那些医务官也在把您一刀刀切开！他们会把您逼疯的，舰长大人，把您变成一台机器。您等着瞧吧！我必须阻止这一切，让这痛苦停止。”{n}罪犯的眼神失去了焦点。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Sé que los oficiales medicae también le están cortando a usted, trozo a trozo! Le harán enloquecer, Lord Capitán, y le convertirán en una máquina. Tengo que detener esto. Detener el dolor». {n}Los ojos del criminal se nublan.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Sé que los oficiales medicae también le están cortando a usted, trozo a trozo! Le harán enloquecer, Lord Capitán, y le convertirán en una máquina. Tengo que detener esto. Detener el dolor». {n}Los ojos del criminal se nublan.{/n}

languages.text: 「メディケア士官たちが、あなたを次々と切り刻んでいるのは知っている！彼らはあなたを狂わせ、機械に変えてしまうのです。今にわかる！私はこれを止めなければならない。痛みを止めるんだ」{n}犯人の目の焦点が定まらない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「メディケア士官たちが、あなたを次々と切り刻んでいるのは知っている！彼らはあなたを狂わせ、機械に変えてしまうのです。今にわかる！私はこれを止めなければならない。痛みを止めるんだ」{n}犯人の目の焦点が定まらない。{/n}

languages.text: "Biliyorum, sıhhiye subayları sizi de parça parça kesiyor! Sizi delirtecekler Lord Kaptan, sizi makineye çevirecekler. Göreceksiniz! Bunu durdurmalıyım. Acıyı durdurmalıyım." {n}Suçlunun gözleri odağını kaybediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Biliyorum, sıhhiye subayları sizi de parça parça kesiyor! Sizi delirtecekler Lord Kaptan, sizi makineye çevirecekler. Göreceksiniz! Bunu durdurmalıyım. Acıyı durdurmalıyım." {n}Suçlunun gözleri odağını kaybediyor.{/n}
